name: libregexp-pattern-perl
title: libregexp-pattern-perl
summary: convention/framework for modules that contain collection of regexes
description:
convention/framework for modules that contain collection of regexes
Regexp::Pattern is a convention
for organizing reusable regexp patterns in modules,
as well as framework to provide convenience
in using those patterns in your program.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libregexp-pattern-perl because convention/framework for modules that contain collection of regexes.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libregexp-pattern-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libregexp-pattern-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libregexp-pattern-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
